d: Odie fires a Corrosive Dart, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage and Dart Poison to an enemy. The poisoned target will receive [[30%]]<ATK> damage every second until defeated. Dart Poison cannot be dispelled.
Gains [[600]] Energy when a poisoned enemy is defeated, but only [[200]] Energy if the enemy is a summoned unit.
Increases damage to [[200%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[225%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Odie deals [[60%]]<ATK> damage to an enemy 3 times. The attacks from this skill are considered normal attacks.
Increases damage to [[62%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[65%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[70%]]<ATK>.

Odie prioritizes launching normal attacks at the nearest poisoned target. When the normal attacks hit a poisoned target, the [[base damage|original]] of the target's Dart Poison is permanently increased by [[25%]], up to [[20]] stacks.
Increases the range of normal attacks and Ultimate to [[7]] tiles.
Increases Dart Poison's base damage to [[27%]].
Increases Dart Poison's base damage to [[29%]].
Increases ATK SPD by [[21]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[27]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[33]] during battle.

Odie immediately defeats poisoned enemies when their HP drops below a threshold equal to [[5.2]] times the [[base damage|original]] dealt by Dart Poison per second. Each time a poisoned enemy is defeated, the threshold is increased by [[0.5]] times the [[base damage|original]] dealt by Dart Poison per second, up to [[2]] times.
Increases the threshold to [[5.7]] times the [[base damage|original]] dealt by Dart Poison per second.
Gains [[600]] Initial Energy.
Increases the threshold to [[6.2]] times the [[base damage|original]] dealt by Dart Poison per second.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 16 ATK SPD, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: Odie increases Triple Tap's damage against poisoned target by [[1.5]] times the Dart Poison damage per second.
